en: After two whole years, Pharaoh dreamed that he was standing by the Nile,
zh: 過了兩年，法老作了一個夢，夢見自己站在河邊。

en: and behold, there came up out of the Nile seven cows attractive and plump, and they fed in the reed grass.
zh: 有七頭母牛從河裡上來，又健美又肥壯，在蘆葦中吃草。

en: And behold, seven other cows, ugly and thin, came up out of the Nile after them, and stood by the other cows on the bank of the Nile.
zh: 接著，又有另外七頭母牛從河裡上來，又醜陋又瘦弱，站在岸上其他母牛旁邊。

en: And the ugly, thin cows ate up the seven attractive, plump cows. And Pharaoh awoke.
zh: 這些醜陋瘦弱的母牛，竟把那七隻健美肥壯的母牛吃掉，法老就醒了。

en: And he fell asleep and dreamed a second time. And behold, seven ears of grain, plump and good, were growing on one stalk.
zh: 他又睡著，作了第二個夢，夢見一根麥莖，長出七個麥穗，又肥壯又美好。

en: And behold, after them sprouted seven ears, thin and blighted by the east wind.
zh: 接著，又長出七個麥穗，又乾瘦又被東風吹焦了。

en: And the thin ears swallowed up the seven plump, full ears. And Pharaoh awoke, and behold, it was a dream.
zh: 這些乾瘦的麥穗，竟把那七個又肥壯又飽滿的麥穗吞下去，法老就醒了，原來是一個夢。

en: So in the morning his spirit was troubled, and he sent and called for all the magicians of Egypt and all its wise men. Pharaoh told them his dreams, but there was none who could interpret them to Pharaoh.
zh: 到了早晨，法老心裡煩亂，就派人去把埃及所有的術士和智慧人都召了來；法老把自己的夢告訴他們，但是沒有人能替法老解夢。

en: Then the chief cupbearer said to Pharaoh, "I remember my offenses today.
zh: 那時酒政告訴法老說：“我今日想起了我的過錯。

en: When Pharaoh was angry with his servants and put me and the chief baker in custody in the house of the captain of the guard,
zh: 從前法老惱怒臣僕，把我和膳長關在軍長府的監房裡。

en: we dreamed on the same night, he and I, each having a dream with its own interpretation.
zh: 我們二人在同一夜都作了夢；我們的夢各有不同的解釋。

en: A young Hebrew was there with us, a servant of the captain of the guard. When we told him, he interpreted our dreams to us, giving an interpretation to each man according to his dream.
zh: 在那裡有一個希伯來的少年人與我們在一起，他是軍長的僕人，我們把夢告訴了他，他就替我們解夢，各人的夢有不同的解釋。

en: And as he interpreted to us, so it came about. I was restored to my office, and the baker was hanged."
zh: 結果，事情都照著他給我們的解釋實現了：我恢復了原職，膳長卻被掛起來。”

en: Then Pharaoh sent and called Joseph, and they quickly brought him out of the pit. And when he had shaved himself and changed his clothes, he came in before Pharaoh.
zh: 法老於是派人去召約瑟。他們就急忙把約瑟從監裡帶出來。他剃了頭、刮了臉、換了衣服，就進去見法老。

en: And Pharaoh said to Joseph, "I have had a dream, and there is no one who can interpret it. I have heard it said of you that when you hear a dream you can interpret it."
zh: 法老對約瑟說：“我作了一個夢，沒有人能夠解釋。我聽見人說，你聽了夢，就能解釋。”

en: Joseph answered Pharaoh, "It is not in me; God will give Pharaoh a favorable answer."
zh: 約瑟回答法老，說：“解夢不在於我，但 神必給法老一個吉祥的解答。”

en: Then Pharaoh said to Joseph, "Behold, in my dream I was standing on the banks of the Nile.
zh: 法老告訴約瑟：“在夢裡我看見我站在河邊。

en: Seven cows, plump and attractive, came up out of the Nile and fed in the reed grass.
zh: 有七頭母牛從河裡上來，又肥壯又健美，在蘆葦中吃草。

en: Seven other cows came up after them, poor and very ugly and thin, such as I had never seen in all the land of Egypt.
zh: 接著，又有另外七頭母牛上來，又軟弱又消瘦又十分醜陋，在埃及全地我沒有見過這樣醜陋的牛。

en: And the thin, ugly cows ate up the first seven plump cows,
zh: 這又消瘦又醜陋的母牛，竟把先前七頭肥壯的母牛吃掉。

en: but when they had eaten them no one would have known that they had eaten them, for they were still as ugly as at the beginning. Then I awoke.
zh: 牠們吃了以後，卻看不出牠們是吃掉了肥牛，因為牠們醜陋的樣子仍是與先前一樣。我就醒了。

en: I also saw in my dream seven ears growing on one stalk, full and good.
zh: 在夢裡我又看見一根麥莖，長出七個麥穗，又飽滿又美好。

en: Seven ears, withered, thin, and blighted by the east wind, sprouted after them,
zh: 接著，又長出了七個麥穗，又枯乾又乾瘦又被東風吹焦了。

en: and the thin ears swallowed up the seven good ears. And I told it to the magicians, but there was no one who could explain it to me."
zh: 這些乾瘦的麥穗，竟把那七個美好的麥穗吞下去。我把夢告訴了術士，但是沒有人能替我解答。”

en: Then Joseph said to Pharaoh, "The dreams of Pharaoh are one; God has revealed to Pharaoh what he is about to do.
zh: 約瑟對法老說：“法老的夢都是同一個意思， 神已經把所要作的事告訴法老了。

en: The seven good cows are seven years, and the seven good ears are seven years; the dreams are one.
zh: 七頭美好的母牛是七年，七個美好的麥穗也是七年；兩個夢都是同一個意思。

en: The seven lean and ugly cows that came up after them are seven years, and the seven empty ears blighted by the east wind are also seven years of famine.
zh: 那接著上來的七頭又消瘦又醜陋的母牛是七年，那七個不結實、被東風吹焦了的麥穗也是七年，都是七年饑荒。

en: It is as I told Pharaoh; God has shown to Pharaoh what he is about to do.
zh: 這就是我對法老所說： 神要作的事，他已經向法老顯明了。

en: There will come seven years of great plenty throughout all the land of Egypt,
zh: 看哪，埃及全地必有七年大豐收。

en: but after them there will arise seven years of famine, and all the plenty will be forgotten in the land of Egypt. The famine will consume the land,
zh: 接著又必有七年饑荒；甚至埃及地所有的豐收都被人忘記了，饑荒必把這地毀滅。

en: and the plenty will be unknown in the land by reason of the famine that will follow, for it will be very severe.
zh: 因為接著而來的饑荒太嚴重了，使人不覺得這地有過豐收。

en: And the doubling of Pharaoh's dream means that the thing is fixed by God, and God will shortly bring it about.
zh: 至於法老兩次作夢，是因為 神已經命定這事，並且要快快地實行。

en: Now therefore let Pharaoh select a discerning and wise man, and set him over the land of Egypt.
zh: 因此，法老要找一個有見識有智慧的人，派他管理埃及地。

en: Let Pharaoh proceed to appoint overseers over the land and take one-fifth of the produce of the land of Egypt during the seven plentiful years.
zh: 法老要這樣行，在國中指派官員，當七年豐收的時候，徵收埃及地出產的五分之一。

en: And let them gather all the food of these good years that are coming and store up grain under the authority of Pharaoh for food in the cities, and let them keep it.
zh: 又叫他們把將要來的七個豐年的糧食收集起來，積蓄五穀歸在法老的手下，收在各城裡作糧食。

en: That food shall be a reserve for the land against the seven years of famine that are to occur in the land of Egypt, so that the land may not perish through the famine."
zh: 這些糧食要儲存起來，可以應付將來埃及地的七年饑荒，免得這地被饑荒所滅。”

en: This proposal pleased Pharaoh and all his servants.
zh: 法老和他的臣僕，都贊同這件事。

en: And Pharaoh said to his servants, "Can we find a man like this, in whom is the Spirit of God?"
zh: 於是法老對臣僕說：“像這樣的人，有 神的靈在他裡面，我們怎能找得著呢？”

en: Then Pharaoh said to Joseph, "Since God has shown you all this, there is none so discerning and wise as you are.
zh: 法老對約瑟說：“ 神既然把這事指示了你，就再沒有人像你這樣有見識有智慧了。

en: You shall be over my house, and all my people shall order themselves as you command. Only as regards the throne will I be greater than you."
zh: 你可以掌管我的家，我的人民都要聽從你的話；只有在王位上我比你大。”

en: And Pharaoh said to Joseph, "See, I have set you over all the land of Egypt."
zh: 法老又對約瑟說：“你看，我任命你治理埃及全地。”

en: Then Pharaoh took his signet ring from his hand and put it on Joseph's hand, and clothed him in garments of fine linen and put a gold chain about his neck.
zh: 於是，法老脫下他手上打印的戒指，戴在約瑟的手上；給他穿上細麻的衣服，把金頸鍊掛在他的頸項上；

en: And he made him ride in his second chariot. And they called out before him, "Bow the knee!" Thus he set him over all the land of Egypt.
zh: 又叫約瑟坐在他的副車裡，有人在他前面喊著：“跪下。”這樣，法老任命了約瑟治理埃及全地。

en: Moreover, Pharaoh said to Joseph, "I am Pharaoh, and without your consent no one shall lift up hand or foot in all the land of Egypt."
zh: 法老對約瑟說：“我是法老，但在埃及全地，如果沒有你的許可，沒有人可以隨意作事。”

en: And Pharaoh called Joseph's name Zaphenath-paneah. And he gave him in marriage Asenath, the daughter of Potiphera priest of On. So Joseph went out over the land of Egypt.
zh: 法老給約瑟起名叫撒發那忒．巴內亞，又把安城的祭司波提非拉的女兒亞西納，給約瑟為妻。約瑟出去巡行埃及全地。

en: Joseph was thirty years old when he entered the service of Pharaoh king of Egypt. And Joseph went out from the presence of Pharaoh and went through all the land of Egypt.
zh: 約瑟侍立在埃及王法老面前的時候，年三十歲。約瑟從法老面前出來，遍行埃及全地。

en: During the seven plentiful years the earth produced abundantly,
zh: 在七個豐年的時候，地裡的出產非常豐盛。

en: and he gathered up all the food of these seven years, which occurred in the land of Egypt, and put the food in the cities. He put in every city the food from the fields around it.
zh: 約瑟把埃及七個豐年的一切糧食都收集起來，把糧食存放在城中；各城周圍田地所出的糧食，也存放在各城中。

en: And Joseph stored up grain in great abundance, like the sand of the sea, until he ceased to measure it, for it could not be measured.
zh: 約瑟積蓄了極多的五穀，好像海沙那樣多，甚至他不再記下數量，因為實在無法計算。

en: Before the year of famine came, two sons were born to Joseph. Asenath, the daughter of Potiphera priest of On, bore them to him.
zh: 在荒年還沒有來到以前，約瑟生了兩個兒子，是安城的祭司波提非拉的女兒亞西納給約瑟生的。

en: Joseph called the name of the firstborn Manasseh. "For," he said, "God has made me forget all my hardship and all my father's house."
zh: 約瑟給長子起名叫瑪拿西，因為他說：“ 神使我忘記我所有的困苦，以及我父的全家。”

en: The name of the second he called Ephraim, "For God has made me fruitful in the land of my affliction."
zh: 他給次子起名叫以法蓮，因為他說：“ 神使我在受苦之地繁盛起來。”

en: The seven years of plenty that occurred in the land of Egypt came to an end,
zh: 埃及地的七年豐收一結束，

en: and the seven years of famine began to come, as Joseph had said. There was famine in all lands, but in all the land of Egypt there was bread.
zh: 七年饑荒就隨著來了，正像約瑟所說的一樣。各地都有饑荒，只有埃及全地仍有糧食，

en: When all the land of Egypt was famished, the people cried to Pharaoh for bread. Pharaoh said to all the Egyptians, "Go to Joseph. What he says to you, do."
zh: 等到埃及全地也要挨餓的時候，人民就向法老求糧。法老對所有的埃及人說：“你們到約瑟那裡去，他吩咐你們甚麼，你們就作甚麼。”

en: So when the famine had spread over all the land, Joseph opened all the storehouses and sold to the Egyptians, for the famine was severe in the land of Egypt.
zh: 當時饑荒遍及全國，約瑟就開了所有的糧倉，把糧食賣給埃及人，因為埃及地的饑荒非常嚴重。

en: Moreover, all the earth came to Egypt to Joseph to buy grain, because the famine was severe over all the earth.
zh: 各地的人都到埃及去，向約瑟買糧，因為各地的饑荒都非常嚴重。
